subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Our presence unto him who hath hearkened and responded, that the fragrances of remembrance may draw him unto a station wherein naught among all things shall deter him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن سمع و اجاب لتجذبه نفحات الذکر الی مقام لاتمنعه شی من الاشیا
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @prayer for nearness to God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity
